violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment has employees certified in food safety management. One employee certified in food safety management must register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025

Sanitizer bucket observed in one of the hand-washing sinks. Paper towels were lacking at another hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing and must always be supplied with paper towels for proper hand-washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025

The floor throughout the facility is in poor repair. Several areas are peeling resulting in an inability to clean effectively. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floor is to be repaired using materials that are smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

The floor and wall junctures on either side of the walk-in cooler do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2025
The floor near the ice machine remains in poor repair. water observed pooling in the area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2023

Ambient temperature of cold drawers/prep unit was observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit. TCS foods observed with temperatures 46 - 55 degrees F. Voluntary disposal during inspection. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Service call placed. No TCS foods are to be stored in this unit until it is repaired and maintains a consistent temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2023
The floor near the ice machine remains in poor repair. water observed pooling in the area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2023
